steps.title: Use the complexity clue
steps.content: The passage says binary star systems should make planetary formation nearly impossible, and Patel and Holt needed modeling to identify a complex set of supporting factors. The missing explanation is therefore not simple or obvious.

steps.title: Reject off-topic descriptors
steps.content: A would mean no explanation could be seen at all, C would make the missing explanation inconclusive, and D introduces bias, which the passage never discusses. The remaining word means simple and uncomplicated. The answer is B.
